name: Sarah Chen
story: I was checking the GOES website manually for weeks with no luck. Installed NEXUS Alert on a Friday, got notified of a slot Sunday morning, and booked my appointment for the next week. This literally saved me months of waiting.
notes: Excellent testimonial — specific timeline, emotional impact, clear before/after

name: Michael Rodriguez
story: The Premium tier is absolutely worth it. I upgraded and got a slot notification within 2 days. The 2-minute check interval makes a huge difference — slots really do disappear that fast. Already recommended it to my whole family.
notes: Great Premium tier testimonial — validates pricing, word-of-mouth indicator

name: Emily Thompson
story: Super simple to set up and the notifications are instant. I had my phone on silent but the desktop alert caught my attention immediately. Booked a slot at Niagara Falls that was 4 months earlier than the next available. Game changer!
notes: Good UX testimonial — highlights ease of use and notification reliability

name: David Kim
story: I travel to Tijuana frequently for work and getting SENTRI was a nightmare until I found this extension. Got an alert within a week and booked immediately. The email notifications are perfect — I don't have to keep the extension tab open.
notes: Good SENTRI testimonial — covers use case, highlights email notification feature

name: Jessica Martinez
story: I was refreshing the website multiple times per day for three weeks — so exhausting. Installed NEXUS Alert and within 4 days I had my appointment booked. Wish I'd found this sooner! The peace of mind alone is worth it.
notes: Strong emotional angle — highlights frustration relief, peace of mind value prop
